items.title: Microsoft patches record number of security vulnerabilities, citing its use of AI
items.summary: Microsoft's monthly release of security fixes, dubbed Patch Tuesday, resolved a record 570 security vulnerabilities across the company's product line, thanks to discoveries with AI.

items.title: OpenAI is now using AI to attack its own AI, and it's working better than humans ever did
items.summary: OpenAI's internal GPT-Red model finds successful attacks in 84 percent of test scenarios through self-play training. Human red teamers manage just 13 percent. The results feed directly into hardening models like GPT-5.6 Sol. The article OpenAI is now using AI to attack its own AI

items.title: GPT-5.6 Sol reportedly disproves a 30-year-old statistics conjecture in 90 minutes after humans couldn't crack it
items.summary: A University of Pennsylvania statistics professor used OpenAI's GPT-5.6 Sol Pro to disprove a central open conjecture about the Benjamini-Hochberg method in roughly 90 minutes. The predecessor model, GPT-5.5, couldn't find a solution even after 20 hours. The answer combines known

items.title: OpenAI's Codex now encrypts instructions between AI agents, leaving developers blind to internal delegation

items.title: GPT-5.6 teased as a 'meaningful leap' but slips toward July

It remains the most anticipated frontier release of the quarter.
